source: ICMR & Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India

guidelines.definition: BP ≥ 140/90 mmHg after 20 weeks of gestation without proteinuria
guidelines.action: Refer to PHC/CHC within 48 hours. Monitor BP every 4 hours. Start antihypertensives if BP ≥ 150/100.
guidelines.asha_action: Measure BP, record in MCP card, refer to ANM/PHC immediately

guidelines.definition: BP ≥ 160/110 mmHg with proteinuria (≥2+ on dipstick)
guidelines.action: EMERGENCY — hospital admission required immediately. Administer MgSO4 if available. Call 108.
guidelines.asha_action: Call 108 immediately. Keep patient lying on left side. Do NOT leave patient alone.

guidelines.action: Refer to FRU/district hospital for blood transfusion. Daily IFA tablets. Dietary counseling.
guidelines.asha_action: Ensure patient is taking IFA. Refer to PHC urgently. Provide nutritional counseling about iron-rich foods.

guidelines.action: Double dose of IFA (200mg elemental iron daily). Dietary counseling. Follow up in 4 weeks.
guidelines.asha_action: Ensure IFA compliance. Motivate for iron-rich diet. Check at next home visit.

guidelines.definition: Pregnancy in women < 18 years of age
guidelines.action: Register as high-risk pregnancy. Increase ANC visits to monthly. Nutritional support. Counseling.
guidelines.asha_action: Accompany to all ANC visits. Ensure family support. Screen for domestic violence.

guidelines.definition: Any bleeding from vagina after 28 weeks of pregnancy
guidelines.action: EMERGENCY — Rush to FRU/district hospital immediately. IV access, blood group. Do NOT perform vaginal examination.
guidelines.asha_action: Call 108 immediately. Patient should not walk. Reassure and accompany to hospital.

guidelines.action: EMERGENCY — Protect airway, left lateral position. MgSO4 injection. Rapid transport to hospital.
guidelines.asha_action: DO NOT put anything in mouth. Position on left side. Call 108. Send to hospital immediately.

guidelines.definition: Pre-pregnancy BMI < 18.5 or weight gain < 9 kg by term
guidelines.action: Nutrition counseling. Enroll in PMMVY scheme. Refer to NRC if severely malnourished.
guidelines.asha_action: Link to Anganwadi for supplementary nutrition. Counsel on diet. Ensure PMMVY enrollment.
